title: GIS Chat for QGIS: AI-Powered Chat Assistant Plugin
description: A QGIS plugin that provides an AI-powered chat panel for executing geospatial operations via natural language. Part of the GIS Chat cross-platform suite covering ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, and ESA SNAP.

creators.name: Fehér, Zsolt Zoltán
creators.affiliation: University of Debrecen, Faculty of Agricultural and Food Sciences and Environmental Management
